@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "caddy-4411-2-4-6-regression-presence-of-symlink-breaks-file-server-browse",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "caddy: 2.4.6 regression: presence of symlink breaks file_server browse",
+    "description": "2.4.6 regression: presence of symlink breaks file_server browse. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify caddy troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your caddy installation:\n```bash\ncaddy version\ncaddy validate --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review caddy configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant caddy configuration:\nIt seems that if a symlink exists in a directory, that directory's contents can't be viewed with the browser.  The error is 404.  It happens with valid and broken symlinks.  2.4.5 does not have this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for 2.4.6 regression: presence of symlink breaks file_server…",
+        "description": "Are you sure your build actually includes the fix?\n\nTry this:\n\n```sh\nmkdir /tmp/symlink-test\necho foo > /tmp/symlink-test/foo\nln -s foo /tmp/symlink-test/foo-symlink\ncaddy file-server -browse -root /tmp/symlink-test -listen :8080\n```\n\nWithout the fix (version 2.4.6):\n```sh\n$ curl -I\n```yaml\nmkdir /tmp/symlink-test\necho foo > /tmp/symlink-test/foo\nln -s foo /tmp/symlink-test/foo-symlink\ncaddy file-server -browse -root /tmp/symlink-test -listen :8080\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade caddy to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade caddy:\n```bash\n# Check current version\ncaddy version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm 2.4.6 regression: presence of symlink breaks… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest caddy to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Are you sure your build actually includes the fix?\n\nTry this:\n\n```sh\nmkdir /tmp/symlink-test\necho foo > /tmp/symlink-test/foo\nln -s foo /tmp/symlink-test/foo-symlink\ncaddy file-server -browse -root /tmp/symlink-test -listen :8080\n```\n\nWithout the fix (version 2.4.6):\n```sh\n$ curl -I http://localhost:8080\nHTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\nServer: Caddy\nDate: Fri, 12 Nov 2021 2116 GMT\n```\n\nWith the fix (PR",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "mkdir /tmp/symlink-test\necho foo > /tmp/symlink-test/foo\nln -s foo /tmp/symlink-test/foo-symlink\ncaddy file-server -browse -root /tmp/symlink-test -listen :8080",
+        "$ curl -I http://localhost:8080\nHTTP/1.1 404 Not Found\nServer: Caddy\nDate: Fri, 12 Nov 2021 21:12:16 GMT",
+        "$ curl -I http://localhost:8080\nHTTP/1.1 200 OK\nContent-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8\nServer: Caddy\nDate: Fri, 12 Nov 2021 21:12:30 GMT"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
